================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 45 F4 33 F9 08
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x19
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 102

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x19
PayloadLen   : 102

[EPS P60] Unknown CC: 0x19
